name: ufo-3-digital-agent-galaxy-framework
description: Orchestrate multiple specialized agents into a cohesive system for complex task solving, weaving together diverse capabilities for emergent behavior. Trigger: When building multi-agent systems or agent orchestration frameworks
content:
## UFO^3: Digital Agent Galaxy Framework

Orchestrate multiple specialized agents into a cohesive system for complex task solving, weaving together diverse capabilities for emergent behavior.

### Core Concept

Framework for composing and coordinating diverse autonomous agents

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11332

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When building multi-agent systems or agent orchestration frameworks
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: UFO^3: Weaving the Digital Agent Galaxy
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11332
